description: Version manifest for all governance templates and framework core files. Used by SETUP --upgrade to detect and apply template changes to materialized projects. v1.0.0: Inaugural Claude Code release — full platform migration from GitHub Copilot multi-agent architecture.
upgrade_strategy: Smart Additive Merge — ALL files use the same unified strategy: format-aware structural diff → add new content only → resolve placeholders in additions → preserve all existing content. No separate Cat A/B/C upgrade paths.

content_types.universal: No placeholders. New structural additions are merged additively.
content_types.stack_configured: Contains {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens. New sections/fields are added, placeholders resolved via Smart Discovery + RDR.
content_types.project_data: Project-specific values. New fields/sections added with defaults, existing values never modified.
